---
name: Bug report
about: Report a broken feature or unexpected behaviour
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what's happening.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened (include error messages, screenshots, or console output).

## Environment

- Browser / OS: [e.g. Chrome 126 / macOS 14]
- Deployment: [e.g. Replit hosted / self-hosted]
- Node version (if self-hosted): [e.g. 24.0.0]

## Additional context

Any other information that might be relevant.
